title: AT&T Seller Hub Dynamic Page Prompt (v1)
description: Context payload for AT&T Seller Hub knowledge checks and coaching sessions.

inst.description: Instructions array. inst[0] determines the persona: 'AT&T GENERAL COACH', 'AT&T WIRELESS CHECK', 'AT&T FIBER CHECK', or 'AT&T CC CHECK'.

product.description: AT&T product being assessed or discussed

q_add.description: Questions to ask, in order. Typically 5 for knowledge checks.
